Sirentide — Display math block

Live renderer output — the SVG below was produced by Sirentide from the DSL beside it.

mathblock
\sum_{i=1}^{n} i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}

A standalone full-size display equation: the whole body after mathblock is one LaTeX expression, baked centered. With an injected math renderer it typesets to real glyph paths plus a fraction-bar <rect> (shown here); with the default null renderer it degrades to the raw source as plain-text glyphs — loud, never blank. The math backend is the consumer's choice; the core ships zero runtime dependencies.

All fourteen types on one page: showcase.html · browser-audited renders: gallery
